import React,{useRef,useEffect,useState}from'react';import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Graph(_ref){let{results,currentR,onCanvasClick}=_ref;const canvasRef=useRef(null);const[windowWidth,setWindowWidth]=useState(window.innerWidth);// Отслеживаем изменение ширины окна

const getScale=()=>{if(windowWidth<728)return 30;return 40;};const getCenter=()=>{if(windowWidth<728)return 150;return 200;};useEffect(()=>{const canvas=canvasRef.current;if(!canvas)return;const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');const SCALE=getScale();const CENTER=getCenter();ctx.clearRect(0,0,400,400);drawAxes(ctx,SCALE,CENTER);if(currentR){drawShapes(ctx,currentR,SCALE,CENTER);}results.forEach(point=>{drawPoint(ctx,point,SCALE,CENTER,windowWidth,currentR,results);});},[results,currentR,windowWidth]);const handleClick=e=>{if(!currentR){alert('Сначала выберите радиус R для проверки точки');return;}const canvas=canvasRef.current;if(!canvas)return;const rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();const SCALE=getScale();const CENTER=getCenter();const dpr=window.devicePixelRatio||1;const x=(e.clientX-rect.left)*(canvas.width/rect.width);const y=(e.clientY-rect.top)*(canvas.height/rect.height);const graphX=(x-CENTER)/SCALE;const graphY=(CENTER-y)/SCALE;const roundedX=Math.round(graphX*100)/100;const roundedY=Math.round(graphY*100)/100;console.log("Canvas click: client(".concat(e.clientX,",").concat(e.clientY,"), rect(").concat(rect.left,",").concat(rect.top,"), graph(").concat(roundedX,",").concat(roundedY,")"));onCanvasClick(roundedX,roundedY);};const drawAxes=(ctx,SCALE,CENTER)=>{ctx.strokeStyle='#2c3e50';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.fillStyle='#2c3e50';// Ось X

ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(CENTER,0);ctx.lineTo(CENTER,400);ctx.stroke();// Стрелки
ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(390,CENTER-5);ctx.lineTo(400,CENTER);ctx.lineTo(390,CENTER+5);ctx.fill();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(CENTER-5,10);ctx.lineTo(CENTER,0);ctx.lineTo(CENTER+5,10);ctx.fill();// Разметка осей
ctx.font='12px Arial';ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='top';// Деления по оси X
for(let i=-5;i<=5;i++){if(i!==0){const x=CENTER+i*SCALE;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,CENTER-5);ctx.lineTo(x,CENTER+5);ctx.stroke();ctx.fillText(i.toString(),x,CENTER+10);}}// Деления по оси Y
ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.textBaseline='middle';for(let i=-5;i<=5;i++){if(i!==0){const y=CENTER-i*SCALE;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(CENTER-5,y);ctx.lineTo(CENTER+5,y);ctx.stroke();ctx.fillText(i.toString(),CENTER-10,y);}}// Подписи осей
ctx.fillStyle='#2c3e50';ctx.font='14px Arial';ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('Y',CENTER-10,20);ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText('X',390,CENTER-10);};const drawShapes=(ctx,r,SCALE,CENTER)=>{if(!r||r<=0){return;}const scaleR=r*SCALE;const scaleRHalf=r/2*SCALE;ctx.fillStyle='rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.4)';ctx.strokeStyle='#3498db';ctx.lineWidth=2;// 1. Часть круга в 1-й четверти
ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(CENTER,CENTER,scaleRHalf,-Math.PI/2,0,false);ctx.lineTo(CENTER,CENTER);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();// 2. Треугольник во 2-й четверти
ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(CENTER,CENTER);// (0,0)
ctx.lineTo(CENTER-scaleR,CENTER);// (-R,0)
ctx.lineTo(CENTER,CENTER-scaleR);// (0,R)
ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();// 3. Прямоугольник в 3-й четверти

}else{// Точки с другими R
